title: Daily Memo: US-Saudi Ties, Israeli Plans for Lebanon
author: Geopolitical Futures
summary:
Nuclear cooperation. The White House last month sent a report to Congress laying out the case for sharing nuclear technology with Saudi Arabia, Bloomberg reported. The arrangement would include cooperation in uranium enrichment and plutonium reprocessing. According to the document, viewed by the publication, the deal would advance U.S. security interests and provide Washington with […]

Nuclear cooperation. The White House last month sent a report to Congress laying out the case for sharing nuclear technology with Saudi Arabia, Bloomberg reported. The arrangement would include cooperation in uranium enrichment and plutonium reprocessing. Geopolitical Futures (GPF) was founded in 2015 by George Friedman, international strategist and author of The Storm Before the Calm and The Next 100 Years. GPF is non-ideological, analyzes the world and forecasts the future using geopolitics: political, economic, military and geographic dimensions at the foundation of a nation.
